description: Lock Surveyed Road & Administrative Maps to Roman survey-based administrative mapping, not text-only route guides.

checks.reason: The corrected node is anchored to Vespasian-era Orange cadastral and early imperial Roman survey-mapping evidence rather than the old Classical era-default placeholder.
Measured administrative maps are produced from land-surveying practice.
Geometry remains an enabling mathematical context for measured survey mapping.
Text route guides and itineraries are not the production method for surveyed administrative maps.
Record-office preservation is context for Roman maps and registers, not a direct prerequisite for survey mapping.
